EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IGeometryServer

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to standard operations on geometric 'value' objects. The input geometries are never modified by these operations. Designed for use in building web services and web applications.

[Guid("CB6DB57F-CA37-485D-B0A5-0931FA62AB84")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IGeometryServer

Methods

Buffer(ISpatialReference, ISpatialReference, ISpatialReference, IDoubleArray, IUnit, bool, IGeometryArray) 

IGeometryArray Buffer(ISpatialReference pInSR, ISpatialReference pBufferSR, ISpatialReference pOutSR, IDoubleArray pDistances, IUnit pUnit, bool bUnion, IGeometryArray pInGeometries)

Parameters

pInSR ISpatialReference
pBufferSR ISpatialReference
pOutSR ISpatialReference
pDistances IDoubleArray
pUnit IUnit
bUnion bool
pInGeometries IGeometryArray

Returns

IGeometryArray

Densify(ISpatialReference, IGeometryArray, double, bool, double) 

IGeometryArray Densify(ISpatialReference pSR, IGeometryArray pInGeometries, double maxSegmentLength, bool useDeviationDensification, double densificationParameter)

Parameters

pSR ISpatialReference
pInGeometries IGeometryArray
maxSegmentLength double
useDeviationDensification bool
densificationParameter double

Returns

IGeometryArray

FindSRByWKID(string, int, int, bool, bool)

Defines an SR based upon its well known identifier (WKID) and optionally a WKID for a vertical datum. The resolution and xy tolerances are either computed from the sr horizon or set to defaults. 'authority' is typically either 'EPSG' or 'Esri'.

ISpatialReference FindSRByWKID(string authority, int wkid, int WKID_Z, bool bDefaultXYResolution, bool bDefaultXYTolerance)

Parameters

authority string
wkid int
WKID_Z int
bDefaultXYResolution bool
bDefaultXYTolerance bool

Returns

ISpatialReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

FindSRByWKT(string, string, bool, bool)

Defines a spatial reference object based upon its well known text string (WKT) and optionally a WKT for a vertical datum. The resolution and xy tolerances are either computed from the sr horizon or set to defaults. The output sr is always high precision.

ISpatialReference FindSRByWKT(string wkt, string WKT_Z, bool bDefaultXYResolution, bool bDefaultXYTolerance)

Parameters

wkt string
WKT_Z string
bDefaultXYResolution bool
bDefaultXYTolerance bool

Returns

ISpatialReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

FindUnitsByWKID(string, int)

Defines a unit object based upon its well known identified (WKID). 'authority' is typically either 'EPSG' or 'Esri'.

IUnit FindUnitsByWKID(string authority, int wkid)

Parameters

authority string
wkid int

Returns

IUnit

Examples

Sample Snippet

FindUnitsByWKT(string)

Defines a unit object based upon its well known text string.

IUnit FindUnitsByWKT(string wkt)

Parameters

wkt string

Returns

IUnit

Examples

Sample Snippet
